narrative: Pearl held a strong upday: $PRL is volume-weighted around $0.67 across four Ethereum venues (+31.8% 24h, ~$57.4k notional), pushing fully-circulating cap to ~$111M. Network hashrate climbed to 15.94 EH/s with the MinePRL pool growing 56 → 79 active workers; block production held at ~116s. Bridge collateralization jumped from 1.35% to 8.26% as ~18.5k WPRL was burned (redeemed back to PRL) against an ~8.5k PRL custody outflow — more PRL backing fewer WPRL. Shipping cadence stays high: 34 commits on the public frontend and 29 on PearlWallet (v0.2.11 today added the PWA install prompt and an iOS storage warning).

market.prl_circulating_supply_method: block_height × current_block_reward (constant-subsidy approximation — Pearl is in month 1, before the first halving)

network.active_workers_scope: MinePRL pool only — network-wide miner count is not exposed by Pearl RPC

anomalies: Surplus reserve jumped 1.35% → 8.26% in 24h: ~18.5k WPRL burned vs ~8.5k PRL custody outflow (more PRL backing fewer WPRL — bridge is more over-collateralized, not less).

social.summary: X API not exercised this run — social section carried light. Pearl-net conversation continues on @prlnet, @pearlbridgexyz, @pearl_research; the public reaction to today’s +30% PRL move will be sampled in tomorrow’s refresh.

github.last_commit_msg: bug fix for bitcoin utils package serializing OP_PUSHDATA1 opcode (#115)
merge next → main: ecosystem schema v2 + mobile T&C
v0.2.11: install prompt on Splash + iOS storage warning
